text: 16. Right to begin. - (1) On the day fixed, or on any other day to which the hearing may be adjourned, the appellant shall he heard in support of the appeal. (2) The Court shall then, if it does not dismiss the appeal at once, hear the respondent against the appeal and in such case the appellant shall be entitled to reply. High Court Amendment-[Allahabad].-In sub-rule (1), delete the words "on the day fixed, or on any other day to which the hearing may be adjourned".-(22-12-1951).
